mapper.select: SELECT site, presale_url, sold_url, profit_rate, exchange_rate FROM ebay_link_template
SELECT site, presale_url, sold_url, profit_rate, exchange_rate FROM ebay_link_template WHERE site = #{site}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ebay_link_template (site, presale_url, sold_url, profit_rate, exchange_rate) VALUES (#{site}, #{presaleUrl}, #{soldUrl}, #{profitRate}, #{exchangeRate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE presale_url = VALUES(presale_url), sold_url = VALUES(sold_url), profit_rate = VALUES(profit_rate), exchange_rate = VALUES(exchange_rate)
